listening.title: Listening: Reasons and results
listening.transcript: I was late because the traffic was heavy. It rained heavily, so we stayed at home. Although it was expensive, she bought the dress.

questions.question: Why was the speaker late?
questions.explanation: "I was late because the traffic was heavy."

listening.title: Listening: Review — Rules and advice
listening.transcript: You must wear a helmet, but you don't have to wear a uniform. You should see a doctor if a headache continues. I enjoy walking to work because it isn't too far.
